Runic Carver  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 37
DMG: 18 Dmg Bonus: 134
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Slot: PRIMARY

Post Comment
Okay for berserkers
QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2004 at 9:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966081797
View User Forum
Scholar
366 posts
My berserker uses a runic carver. I found one in the bazaar at a great price, and he needed something better than his newbie axe. So yes, berserkers can use this weapon.
▲ Page top
Bargain
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2004 at 2:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760188655
10 posts
I bought one of these in Felwithe for a little more than 6pp off an NPC merchant(100 CHA). If you find any on a merchant,buy it! Much cheaper than Bazaar and a very good weapon for 2Handers :-) I could have sworn it was usable by Berserkers too....I'll have to recheck it as I'm planning to give it to my berserker on Brell server.
▲ Page top
Sweet 1st 2Hander
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2003 at 4:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759826252
View User Forum
21 posts
My Froggie Pally saved up my plat and bought this as before moving to Kurn. Froggys First 2Hander.
OK at first, but I knew it would get better as he skilled up. And did it! especially after 20 (Double Attk too) with the damage cap off.

This will definitely hold me until Ghoulbane.
▲ Page top
My first
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2002 at 10:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252678401
341 posts
This was my first 2h slashing weapon given to me from a rl friend who also played eq. It was great and I used it till about lvl 30 when he gave me something better, I don't remember what it was. They are very cheep though, less than 200pp for sure nowadays.

Takata K'Trazz LVL 58 Darkelf Myrmidon of Rallos Zek
Emarr
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=251453
▲ Page top
Just ok
QuoteReply
# Apr 21 2002 at 4:26 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761222747
147 posts
This isn't a bad weapon for a young Pally who wants to up his two handed slash. But there are a load of 2 handed weapons that will do similar damage. I have an Axe of frost and Fire brand runed something or other. But on simply a damage ratio for a pally I like the sporali Defender blade and a shield to bash with.

Apally (level 16 Paladin of Brell)
Terris-Thule

ya its decent but if that price is right of 206pp might as well by a BABS for 100-150.

▲ Page top
Just got it
QuoteReply
# Mar 17 2002 at 10:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772491057
34 posts
i just bought this off i guy in Butcherblock for 150pp. pretty cool looking weapon, the nice thing is though it has a low delay for practice and can do some pretty good damage at my level. i can't wait for the damage cap to be gone when i hit level 20.

Banton
Paladin of 18 seasons
Tribunal
▲ Page top
Klyseer isn't hard to kill
QuoteReply
# Mar 09 2002 at 4:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250854409
9 posts
You don't need a full 50+ group to kill this Korsear Klyseer. When the first time I encount this Guy, I'm 51 shaman and grouping with my 53 enchanter friend doing hunting using our pets. We killed Korsear Klyseer fairly easy. At the beginning of the fight chanter mez his pet and we send in our pets, Chant do Tashin, then I slow, landed a couple dots. After that we just sit and keep our pet heal.

We killed Korsear three times that nite. He drop the sword three times. And the last sword ended up Rot on ground since no one come loot it even we keep shouting.
▲ Page top
RE: Klyseer isn't hard to kill
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2004 at 5:07 PM Rating: Decent
quickshot
14 posts
just wanted to say your right he is an easy kill, just did him with my 52SK solo kept him feared and never even got the HT.
▲ Page top
Drops from
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2002 at 11:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249478566
Scholar
84 posts
Spelling might be off a letter or two

Korasal Klyseer

He's a fairly common random spawn at the fort just outside Chardok in Burning Wood. I've seen him in several different locations, so I'd assume that any of those Sarnaks is his PH. He's a Shadow Knight so expect a hefty harm touch, 600ish.

Sslythr
59 Iksar Monk
Lanys T'Vyl

hey
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 10:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252264129

29 posts
got it from guildy to work on 2hs and when i was done i gave it away to one who needed more then i
▲ Page top
Nice Sword
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2002 at 7:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251536253
24 posts
I got this a while ago and hase used it since lvl 5. Although i am not that high a lvl it looks awesome and does a fair amount of damage+plus it scares some nasty elf pkers away from my lower lvl friends. :) I was lucky to get it from a dude in the bank. He literally handed it to me and said give your old weapon to someone else. I did and my friend is happy!
▲ Page top
I paid 9pp for this thing!
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2001 at 12:57 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966134743
1 post
It's true, I only paid 9 plat. from a vendor in Rivervale by the name of Byl Bobbinshort!

i play on Rodcet Nife.

is this a deal or what?
▲ Page top
Cool sword
QuoteReply
# Nov 24 2001 at 9:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772048089
2 posts
I got this sword at level 23, and traded my Drakkel Forged ******* Sword + 103pp for it. I love the looks, and it's faster than the Drakkel (I'm all about speed). I'm currently at 24, and my attack rating is at over 500, and i can do up to 42 dmg, where, with my Drakkel, i did up to 46, not a bad trade off.
I agree, it is a good sword for paladins/Sk's at the lower levels, but there ARE better swords.

Ryoshi Kazuma,
High Elven paladin of Morell Thule
▲ Page top
How to get
QuoteReply
# Oct 20 2001 at 1:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758277713
7 posts
OK, here is the deal people, my group had this drop off of a named Sarnak (can't remember name) in BurningWoods right in front of the zone into Chardok. He dropped 2 swords at once the first time we killed him, 1 the second time, and 1 the third time. He spawned 3 times in a row in a span of about 20 mins total, but unfortunatly this mob was red to me at 42, and took a full group of 50+ to wipe em all out, thus not a good weapon to get yourself unless it's for an alt, cause by that time you have way better.

Needa Life
42 Cleric
Test Server
▲ Page top
RE: How to get
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2001 at 7:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966018781
7 posts
Yep..I agree with Needa Life here. I got one lastnight off the named Sarnak in the Sarnak fort in BW. I can't remember his name either but he was standing around the table in the big room just outside the Chardok zone. The mob was blue to me at level 51 and had a skelly pet. I haven't seen this drop in Chardok yet.

Lothan
51 Cavalier
Vazaelle Server
▲ Page top
RE: How to get
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2001 at 7:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758165483
View User Forum
Scholar
92 posts
Just a little more info. Myself (44 druid) along with a 45 ranger and a 54 druid where pulling singles in the room right before chardok entrance in burning woods. The named on was named something like Klesser Klyseer, not sure if that is exact spelling but it is close. He has a pet, he conned even to me the first time and blue the second time. Dropped this carver both times. The pet is weak, went down with 1 shot of banish summoned. The named is harder though and hits very hard.

good till lvl 28
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 4:31 PM Rating: Decent

5 posts
i had this with my ranger and it was good from when i got it at lvl 24 till about 28 then it goes down hill from there. there are much better weapons out there
▲ Page top
Woo-Hoo!
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 2:06 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got this weapon from a very friendly stranger when I was in dire need of help and I am so glad to have one now. I'm a 10th level warrior, and this thing is helping me kick some major butt. Not only is that all, it also looks cool as heck on my girl. The damage rating is unbelievable for my being only at level 10 and the delay is wonderful. Nice weapon to have when you're lowerer leveled. Just my opinion.

Happy Hunting Everyone!
Kinbene- Female Warrior of Morell-Thule
▲ Page top
RE: Woo-Hoo!
QuoteReply

Lucky me :)
QuoteReply
# Jun 14 2001 at 1:41 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got this sword for 30pp ing items and money! i gave a shinny vrass shield and 20pp for this lovely weapon and it does me wonders although (sigh) i need to put it in retirement and get a jarsyth battle sword... It is even better but i love the looks of these 2 brotherhood swords... i hate buying claymores and so forth they look so whimpy where this stands out when i walk in a room filled with twinked people and i say yeah that's right this is my own flesh and blood!!!

# Jun 06 2001 at 6:42 PM Rating: Default

If this price is average then this guy on Solusek Ro server was doing some good drugs. He was trying to get 1200 for it. Good thing I only inquired about it. Who needs this garbage when you have dual weild anyway.

# Jul 03 2001 at 8:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759149507
150 posts
Good for low level Paladins and SK's, coz they cant Duel Wield.

Plus we have to practise for our Fiery Avenger and Defender (plus Soulfire) dont we?

Well, thats IMHO
▲ Page top
Sweet
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 7:55 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760142958
3 posts
I paid 500pp for this sword and love it! I have seen them sell for as low as 350pp and as high as 700pp. The sword has a 2.05 hit ratio and swings every 3.7 seconds. I'm a level 9 SK and I am hitting for 25pts of damage per swing. I had a Mithril 2h sword with haste effect and was happy, but sold it for 2200pp and baught this and am just as happy, but with a bit more cash in my pocket. Plus the Mithril looked like a Pinto next to this Jag.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 17 2001 at 6:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) wtt for one well if someone is nice enough ill trade a drakkel forged ******* sword for it!
THIS IS A KICK A$$ THING
QuoteReply
# May 09 2001 at 7:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757323426
1 post
Me bieng a 21 level warrior with crit hits and crippling blows this weapon is kewl i used to have a Axe of the iron back but now i retired that weapon (it was getting really boring) and got a Runic Carver from a friend and my nickname in my guild is the bully so i look mean with the weapon in hand. By the way if a warrior is reading this and is lower then 21 when you hit your20's Aviaks are great to hunt and in Lake of ill omen is good to..
Lilana
21 level warrior Crimson Knights of Xev
Don't beleive in anyone
